failureReasons: TrackSafetyValidator repaired/removed too much generated geometry
recommendedTuningNotes: Open clearance around high-contact machines or add stronger down-track force zones.
Regenerate or remove the closest machine near the replay failure point.
Relax machine density or move machines away from walls before validation.
Reduce start-lane bias or increase early splitter/pegboard variance.

Reduce pinball density or widen exits before relying on nudges.
